name: First State Bank Of Forsyth
description_short: Community bank in Forsyth, Montana serving customers since 1917 with checking, savings, loans, and mobile banking services.
description_long:
First State Bank of Forsyth is a long-established community bank located in Forsyth, Montana that has been operating for over 100 years. Founded in 1917, the bank has built its reputation on serving local customers with personalized financial services and maintaining deep community ties.

The bank offers a full suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, mobile banking, online banking, and bill pay services. They emphasize being a "full-service financial store" designed to support customers at every stage of their financial journey, from basic transaction accounts to borrowing needs.

First State Bank of Forsyth differentiates itself through its longevity and community focus, having maintained a consistent local presence for over a century. The bank advertises competitive rates and reasonable fees compared to other institutions, and they actively educate customers about financial security, including fraud prevention awareness through their "BanksNeverAskThat" campaign.

As a community bank, First State Bank of Forsyth is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. However, as a small regional institution in rural Montana, they likely have limited digital innovation compared to larger national banks or fintech alternatives, and their geographic footprint is restricted to the Forsyth area.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
Over 100 years of continuous operation and community presence since 1917
Full-service offerings including checking, savings, loans, bill pay, and mobile banking
Advertises competitive interest rates and reasonable fees
Extended drive-up hours (8:15 AM start times) for customer convenience
Active fraud education and scam prevention awareness programs
Local decision-making and personalized service in rural community
cons: Limited to single location in Forsyth, Montana with no branch network
Likely limited digital/online capabilities compared to major national banks
Geographic restriction makes services inaccessible to customers outside Forsyth area
Small institution may lack specialized products offered by larger banks
Limited weekend hours (closed Saturdays and Sundays)
best_for: Residents of Forsyth, Montana seeking local community banking relationships
Customers who value long-term institutional stability and local decision-making
Small business owners in the Forsyth area needing personal and business banking
diagnosis: First State Bank of Forsyth is ideal for residents of Forsyth, Montana seeking traditional community banking with personalized service and a century-long track record. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank operates only from a single location and serves the local Forsyth community, making it inaccessible to customers outside this rural Montana area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
